sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT LastWatermark
FROM dbo.SF_Watermark_Control
WHERE ObjectName = '@{item()}'

query.value:
SELECT QualifiedApiName
FROM EntityDefinition
WHERE QualifiedApiName LIKE '%__c'
AND IsQueryable = true
AND IsDeprecatedAndHidden = false
